name: ExtensionExplanationOfBenefit_Item_Adjudication_Quantity
title: R5: quantity additional types
description: R5: `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.quantity` additional types (Quantity) additional types from child elements (code, comparator, system, unit)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.quantity` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.quantity` 0..1 `Quantity`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.quantity` 0..1 `Quantity`
*  R4B: `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.value` 0..1 `decimal`
*  R4: `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.value` 0..1 `decimal`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.quantity` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.value` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.quantity` do not cover the following types: Quantity.
The mappings for `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.quantity` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: code, comparator, system, unit.

element.definition: R5: `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.quantity` additional types (Quantity) additional types from child elements (code, comparator, system, unit)
element.comment:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.quantity` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.value` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.quantity` do not cover the following types: Quantity.
The mappings for `ExplanationOfBenefit.item.adjudication.quantity` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: code, comparator, system, unit.
For example: eligible percentage or co-payment percentage.

element.definition: A non-monetary value associated with the category. Mutually exclusive to the amount element above.
element.comment: For example: eligible percentage or co-payment percentage.
